message:
chore(deps): update all dependencies to latest stable versions

Production dependencies:
- next: 16.0.10 → 16.1.6 (App Router improvements, Turbopack stability)
- react / react-dom: 19.2.3 → 19.2.4
- framer-motion: 12.27.0 → 12.34.0 (new animation primitives)
- lucide-react: 0.561.0 → 0.563.0
- katex: 0.16.27 → 0.16.28
- zod: 4.3.5 → 4.3.6

Dev dependencies:
- eslint-config-next: 16.0.10 → 16.1.6 (stricter react-hooks rules)
- @playwright/test + playwright: 1.57.0 → 1.58.2
- vitest: 4.0.17 → 4.0.18
- @types/node: 25.0.2 → 25.2.2
- @types/react: 19.2.7 → 19.2.13
- @axe-core/playwright: 4.11.0 → 4.11.1
- @testing-library/react: 16.3.1 → 16.3.2
- @vitejs/plugin-react: 5.1.2 → 5.1.4

Intentionally skipped:
- eslint 10.0.0 (major version, requires config migration)
- jsdom 28.0.0 (major version, may break test setup)

Verified: bun tsc --noEmit, bun lint, and bun run build all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
